message:
fix(search): add default priority and improve metrics cache consistency

Minor improvements to the search package:

## Default Priority in IssueMetrics

Updates defaultIssueMetrics() to initialize Priority field to 2 (medium)
rather than leaving it as zero value. This ensures unknown issues have
a sensible default priority rather than appearing as P0 (critical).

## Metrics Cache Test Coverage

Enhances test coverage for metrics cache edge cases and consistency
checks across cache operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
